description: A system-generated report shows items on the sales floor that have fallen below their presentation minimum. An associate needs to restock them.

nodes.task_description: Generate or view the daily 'shelf replenishment' report.

expected_outcome.expected: The associate gets a prioritized list of items that need restocking.

nodes.task_description: Go to the backroom and pick the items and quantities specified on the report.

expected_outcome.expected: The associate gathers all the needed stock.

nodes.task_description: Restock the items on the sales floor and mark the tasks as complete on the report.

expected_outcome.expected: All low-stock items from the report are replenished on the shelves.
